title: 3D Secure version catalogue
description: 3DS version support matrix. 3DS 1.0.2 is the legacy protocol (deprecated by most issuers 2022+); 3DS 2.1.0 was the original 3DS2 spec; 3DS 2.2.0 added merchant-exempted flow (frictionless authentication + delegated authentication + issuer risk-based decisioning).

versions.description: Original 3DS protocol. Redirect-based challenge flow. Deprecated by Visa + Mastercard 2022+; issuers may reject or downgrade to 2.x. NOT ISSUED FROM STACKRA — kept in enum for historical Payment.three_ds_version values.
versions.typical_challenge_ux: iframe redirect to issuer's ACS page

versions.description: Original 3DS2 spec. Adds device fingerprinting + risk-based authentication + frictionless flow (issuer can approve without customer challenge if risk-signals are strong). PSD2-compliant.
versions.typical_challenge_ux: in-app challenge (SDK) or biometric prompt on issuer's app

versions.description: Adds merchant-initiated flow (Merchant Initiated Transactions can bypass 3DS2 under specific exemptions), delegated authentication (issuer defers to merchant-owned authentication), and richer risk data. PSD2-compliant. Recommended default.
versions.typical_challenge_ux: in-app challenge with richer context / biometric / frictionless

outcome_semantics.authenticated: Customer completed the challenge OR frictionless flow approved. LIABILITY SHIFT — issuer bears fraud liability.
outcome_semantics.not_attempted: Merchant chose to skip 3DS2 (permitted under specific exemptions — small transactions, whitelisted merchants). Merchant retains liability.
outcome_semantics.rejected: Customer failed the challenge OR issuer rejected. Payment declined.
outcome_semantics.not_supported: Issuing bank doesn't support 3DS2. Fallback to 3DS1 or friction-full flow — merchant retains liability.
outcome_semantics.bypassed: Merchant exemption (low-value transaction < €30, whitelisted merchant, low-risk merchant risk-based analysis). Merchant retains liability.

psd2_thresholds.notes: PSD2 SCA required for card transactions >= €30 in EEA + UK + Switzerland unless exemption applies. Tenants can override the threshold per region via payment.three_ds.required_over_amount_cents (only INCREASE required auth — cannot decrease below the legal threshold in EU regions).
